channel.title: postgres on Cameron DeCoster
channel.description: Recent content in postgres on Cameron DeCoster

item.title: My Old Apps Broke
item.description: While going through the Bloc curriculum (which became Thinkful then became Chegg, I think), I created two applications for assignements: Expense Tracker and Quiz Builder. They both followed the same template: React single page application deployed to Vercel that connects to Express API and PostgreSQL database hosted on Heroku. Neither of these apps will win awards, but I did learn a lot by creating them. In the process of creating this blog and generally updating my online presence, I discovered that they stopped working.
